name: No witnesses to my slip at work in Bountiful, can I still claim?
description: Yes, medical proof and report enough.[1]

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my slip at work in Bountiful, can I still claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, medical proof and report enough.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, your report, medical records, and circumstances suffice without witnesses.** Utah doesn't require witnesses for comp claims.[1] Key factors: Document promptly; photos help. Doctor's opinion on cause key. Insurers investigate but can't deny solely on no witnesses.
